description: The Department of CSE at GNITS is one of the premier departments offering cutting-edge education in software development, algorithms, data structures, artificial intelligence, machine learning, and cloud computing. Established in 1997, the department has produced thousands of successful IT professionals.
programs_offered: B.Tech CSE (4 years), M.Tech CSE (2 years)
department_location: CSE Block - First Floor and Second Floor

description: The IT Department focuses on information systems, networking, database management, web technologies, cybersecurity, and software engineering. The department maintains state-of-the-art computer labs with high-speed internet connectivity.
The ECE Department provides comprehensive education in electronic circuits, signal processing, VLSI design, embedded systems, wireless communications, and telecommunications engineering.
programs_offered: B.Tech ECE (4 years), M.Tech VLSI (2 years)

description: The EEE Department covers power systems, control systems, electrical machines, power electronics, renewable energy systems, and industrial automation providing strong fundamentals in electrical engineering.

The Mechanical Engineering Department offers education in thermodynamics, fluid mechanics, manufacturing processes, CAD/CAM, robotics, and industrial engineering with well-equipped labs and workshops.

The Mathematics Department supports all engineering departments by providing strong foundations in calculus, linear algebra, differential equations, probability, statistics, and numerical methods. It also offers research opportunities.

The Humanities and Sciences Department covers English communication, technical writing, economics, environmental studies, and basic sciences including physics and chemistry for first-year engineering students.
programs_offered: Foundation courses for all B.Tech programs

description: The MBA Department at GNITS provides management education with specializations in Finance, Marketing, Human Resources, and Operations. The program focuses on developing business leaders with ethical values.

The MCA Department offers advanced computer science education covering software engineering, database systems, mobile computing, cloud technologies, and research methodologies preparing students for IT industry and academia.
